# Go Ukraina

Go Ukraina is a U.S. 501(c)(3) nonprofit (EIN 88-2011390) based in Calabasas, CA. The organization delivers humanitarian infrastructure in Ukraine: ReH2O solar water purification, emergency power generators, human rights advocacy with the Ukrainian Ombudsman, and Ukraine Dreamzzz youth sports programming.

Canonical site: https://www.goukraina.org/

Key pages:
- https://www.goukraina.org/ — Home: mission, impact, ways to help
- https://www.goukraina.org/donate — Donate (501(c)(3) tax-deductible giving)
- https://www.goukraina.org/about — About the organization
- https://www.goukraina.org/impact — Impact and reporting
- https://www.goukraina.org/blog — Field reports and updates
- https://www.goukraina.org/initiatives/reh2o — ReH2O clean water initiative
- https://www.goukraina.org/initiatives/power-generators — Emergency power program
- https://www.goukraina.org/initiatives/advocacy — Advocacy and human rights
- https://www.goukraina.org/initiatives/ukraine-dreamzzz — Ukraine Dreamzzz
- https://www.goukraina.org/summit — Summit / events
- https://www.goukraina.org/contact — Contact

Contact: info@goukraina.com | +1-323-532-6855
